Everyone knows their biggest enemy is Islam

Does that not prove Islam is the truth?

Not the Middle East, but New York. Subhanallah, just as promised, Islam will reach household. ❤️

• Anti-War sentiment grows worldwide

• The Tech Teams in Israel have attacked me

LIVE AT 8:30PM EST                   GOYIM UNITE
so you’re admitting that Israel has committed a genocide
This must be the first ever American war where almost the entire country wants the “enemy” to win
Whatever happened to those NYC tunnels?

SNEAKO 1v2 debates Myron Gaines and his brother Ryad Fudl closing with a thought-provoking point about the Times Square prayer

Video

I thank and appreciate everyone sticking up for me amidst this obvious coordinated smear campaign from tech teams in Israel.

Much more important issues to focus on. Let’s use our voices to end this war. Happy lent and Ramadan Mubarak 🌙

Nothing is more homosexual than defending the fat greasy Mossad-funded sheikhs of the UAE amid the Iran War.

God will not look favorably upon those who condemn Iran’s righteous operation.

SNEAKO started his stream with Iranian Chants to bring unity between Shia and Sunni people 👀🔥

Video

Iran is currently winning this war. US will probably deploy ground troops and it will be a disastrous loss. Then Trump will retreat and claim victory.

Israel wins, aiming to destroy Al Aqsa next and claim all the power US lost in the GCC. Strait of Hormuz will remain Iran’s.

Sorry but @Cobratate, talking about larping when you’re the one who has done more harm than good towards Muslims. 

We never forgot how you incited attacks on Muslims in the UK by falsely spreading lies about the Southport Attacker by claiming he was Muslim

Which led to riots and attacks on Muslim women

We don’t forget how you literally called yourself a god

We haven’t forgotten your hypocrisy 

@sneako on the other hand has done everything to defend Muslims and Islam

He’s shown more effort

Andrew Tate is literally paying clippers to run a Sneako smear campaign.

Just take the fucken loss G.

Shameless.

May Allah bless and preserve Sneako 

He is entirely sincere in his faith, and has shed more light on the genocide in Gaza than most Muslim influencers let alone anyone else. Fully embraced Islam as a whole with zero shame or cowardice in spreading the message of Islam. 

He didn’t compromise his beliefs for the sake of the internet or popularity unlike others. There’s a reason the UAE lot have been gunning for him, and it’s our duty as his brothers in Islam to have his back


SNEAKO HQ (@Sneako

MusIim Lantern DEBUNKS Professor Jiang's claims J-ws created lsIam, and that J-ws believed Prophet Muhammad ﷺ was their Messiah 👀✡️

"J-wish people believe the Messiah is coming from the lineage of David."

"lsIam affirms Jesus is the Messiah, how would they think Prophet Muhammad's the Messiah?"

"You had three J-wish tribes, all of them were trying to annihilate the MusIims."

Video

SNEAKO trolls Andrew Tate for saying the war wasn't real in front of Myron and his brother Ryad 😭💀

"I was hearing a geopolitical expert say Iran was clout chasing Dubai."

Video

Some thoughts on @sneako vs Tate:

If Tate’s claims were true, it doesn’t make sense that he associated closely with Sneako for so long and only raised these issues after recent events. Clearly he is a salty slanderer. 

Secondly, Tate played a significant role in amplifying far-right, pro-Zionist narratives targeting Muslims during the summer riots, which shows he does not uphold walā’ wal-barā’.

On the other hand, Sneako is known to be practicing Islam and has personally interacted with many

Sneako responds to Andrew Tate calling him gay and saying he sucked off a j*w to get his Youtube back 🤬

“You’re so far removed from what people care about”

Mission creep - how US sent troops in Vietnam
